languages.text: "Мне противна сама эта мысль. Но если ради блага Лорда-капитана придется пожертвовать рассудком и поддержать замысел сестрицы, я пойду и на это. Обещаю".

traits.locale_text: "Мне противна сама эта мысль. Но если ради блага Лорда-капитана придется пожертвовать рассудком и поддержать замысел сестрицы, я пойду и на это. Обещаю".

languages.text: "The very thought repels me. But if I must sacrifice my sanity and support my sister's scheme for the Lord Captain's sake, I will do it. You have my word."
languages.original_text: "Мне противна сама эта мысль. Но если ради блага Лорда-капитана придется пожертвовать рассудком и поддержать замысел сестрицы, я пойду и на это. Обещаю".

traits.locale_text: "The very thought repels me. But if I must sacrifice my sanity and support my sister's scheme for the Lord Captain's sake, I will do it. You have my word."
"The very thought repels me. But if I must sacrifice my sanity and support my sister's scheme for the Lord Captain's sake, I will do it. You have my word."
"The very thought repels me. But if I must sacrifice my sanity and support my sister's scheme for the Lord Captain's sake, I will do it. You have my word."

languages.text: “光是想到这主意就令我作呕。但若为了舰长大人，我必须舍弃理智去支持我那位姐妹的谋划，那我便去做。我向你保证。”
languages.original_text: "The very thought repels me. But if I must sacrifice my sanity and support my sister's scheme for the Lord Captain's sake, I will do it. You have my word."

traits.locale_text: “光是想到这主意就令我作呕。但若为了舰长大人，我必须舍弃理智去支持我那位姐妹的谋划，那我便去做。我向你保证。”

languages.text: « Cette seule pensée me répugne, mais s'il me faut sacrifier ma santé mentale et soutenir les manigances de ma sœur dans l'intérêt du seigneur-capitaine, je le ferai. Vous avez ma parole. »
languages.original_text: "The very thought repels me. But if I must sacrifice my sanity and support my sister's scheme for the Lord Captain's sake, I will do it. You have my word."

traits.locale_text: « Cette seule pensée me répugne, mais s'il me faut sacrifier ma santé mentale et soutenir les manigances de ma sœur dans l'intérêt du seigneur-capitaine, je le ferai. Vous avez ma parole. »

languages.text: "Düşüncesi bile midemi bulandırıyor. Ancak Lord Kaptan'ın iyiliği için akıl sağlığımdan feragat etmem ve kız kardeşimin entrikasına destek olmam gerekiyorsa gözlerimi kaparım, vazifemi yaparım. Sözüm söz."
languages.original_text: "The very thought repels me. But if I must sacrifice my sanity and support my sister's scheme for the Lord Captain's sake, I will do it. You have my word."

traits.locale_text: "Düşüncesi bile midemi bulandırıyor. Ancak Lord Kaptan'ın iyiliği için akıl sağlığımdan feragat etmem ve kız kardeşimin entrikasına destek olmam gerekiyorsa gözlerimi kaparım, vazifemi yaparım. Sözüm söz."

languages.text: «La mera idea me repugna, pero si debo sacrificar mi cordura y apoyar el complot de mi hermana por el bien del Lord Capitán, lo haré. Tiene mi palabra».
languages.original_text: "The very thought repels me. But if I must sacrifice my sanity and support my sister's scheme for the Lord Captain's sake, I will do it. You have my word."

traits.locale_text: «La mera idea me repugna, pero si debo sacrificar mi cordura y apoyar el complot de mi hermana por el bien del Lord Capitán, lo haré. Tiene mi palabra».

languages.text: "Allein der Gedanke widert mich an. Aber wenn ich meine Vernunft opfern und den Plan meiner Schwester zum Wohl des Lord Captains unterstützen muss, dann werde ich es tun. Ihr habt mein Wort."
languages.original_text: "The very thought repels me. But if I must sacrifice my sanity and support my sister's scheme for the Lord Captain's sake, I will do it. You have my word."

traits.locale_text: "Allein der Gedanke widert mich an. Aber wenn ich meine Vernunft opfern und den Plan meiner Schwester zum Wohl des Lord Captains unterstützen muss, dann werde ich es tun. Ihr habt mein Wort."

languages.text: 「その考えだけで嫌悪感すら覚える。だが、主艦長の為なら、私の精神を犠牲にして妹の計画を支えるならば、そうする。私の言葉に尽きる。」
languages.original_text: "The very thought repels me. But if I must sacrifice my sanity and support my sister's scheme for the Lord Captain's sake, I will do it. You have my word."

traits.locale_text: 「その考えだけで嫌悪感すら覚える。だが、主艦長の為なら、私の精神を犠牲にして妹の計画を支えるならば、そうする。私の言葉に尽きる。」
